reason: Verify architecture and document-style commit expectations.
Verify run/recovery snapshot contract and bridge tests remain aligned.
Verify Rust-owned projection, structured errors, and test coverage.
Verify runtime/recovery distinctions are not collapsed into config state.
Verify run/recovery UI actions and density remain native and Chinese-first.
Verify Swift did not gain domain projection or provider state-machine ownership.
Verify domain projection follows Host, ProviderTarget, Rule, RecoveryItem, and LocalPortBinding concepts.
Verify only supported runtime states/actions are emitted.
Verify page responsibilities stay separated between run/recovery and registry.
Verify local port override remains temporary and non-persistent.
Verify all acceptance criteria and out-of-scope boundaries.
